title: RxJS & Reactive Patterns
subtitle: Observables, operators, subjects, and memory leak prevention
description: RxJS is Angular's reactive programming library, used for HTTP, routing, forms, and event streams. Master the operators that interviewers test — switchMap, mergeMap, combineLatest, and the memory leak patterns that trip up developers.
learningOutcomes: Explain the Observable/Observer/Subscription model and hot vs cold observables
Use creation operators (of, from, fromEvent, interval) appropriately
Choose correctly between switchMap, mergeMap, concatMap, and exhaustMap
Apply filtering operators including debounceTime and distinctUntilChanged
Combine multiple streams with combineLatest, forkJoin, and withLatestFrom
Use Subject, BehaviorSubject, and ReplaySubject for multicasting
Handle errors with catchError and retry without losing the stream
Prevent memory leaks with takeUntilDestroyed and the async pipe
